title: Asia markets trade mixed as investors assess Trump's Iran war comments, extended deadline
summary_full: In an expletive-filled social media post, Trump also vowed to bring "Hell" to the country after the U.S. forces rescued an American airman in Iran last week.
summary_public: In an expletive-filled social media post, Trump also vowed to bring "Hell" to the country after the U.S. forces rescued an American airman in Iran last week.
